NAVAREA XIX 36/16
SEISMIC SURVEY IN PROGRESS 30 APR TO 30 MAY BY M/V WG AMUNDSEN  TOWING 
12 STREAMERS 7000 METER IN LENGTH WITHIN AREA BOUNDED BY.
A. 66-02.8N 007-33.8E
B. 66-02.8N 007-46.8E
C. 65-49.1N 007-46.8E
D. 65-49.1N 009-26.8E
E. 66-40.6N 009-26.8E
F. 66-40.6N 007-31.6E
6NM WIDE BERTH REQUESTED
